name: claude
description: Anthropic / Claude-inspired theme: warm cream paper, clay-coral accent, grotesk + editorial-serif pairing.
vibe: Warm, human, editorial, high-craft, calm — cream paper, soft clay-coral signal, Styrene-style grotesk headings over a Tiempos-style serif body. Restrained, trustworthy, not corporate.
author: Timur Isachenko
